name: Maximus Metals Inc.
description: Maximus Metals Inc. is a junior mineral exploration company that holds an option to acquire 100% of the Gaspard Gold-Silver property located near Williams Lake in central British Columbia, covering approximately 19 square kilometres. The company began trading on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) in February 2026 following the exercise of special warrants issued in November 2025. Maximus is at an early exploration stage with limited historical work conducted on the Gaspard property.
